phases.name: html
phases.prompt: Create the markup for a simple product landing page named 'index.html'. It must be a complete HTML5 document that links a stylesheet 'styles.css' in the <head> and a script 'app.js' with a defer attribute before </body>. Include a <header> with an <h1>, a hero <section>, a features section with three feature cards, and a footer. Give the primary call-to-action a button with id="cta". Output ONLY the complete contents of index.html inside a single ```html code block, nothing else.

phases.name: css
js

scorers.rubric: app.js is valid vanilla JavaScript that wires a click handler to the #cta element defined in the provided index.html, without relying on any framework.
